title: Heptamethylnonane - Canada.ca
content:
This substance was identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Common name and acronym
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Heptamethylnonane (HMN)
Nonane, 2,2,4,4,6,8,8-heptamethyl-
None planned at this time
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 156, No. 6 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 154, No. 5 .
